escrow.title: The Escrow Advantage
escrow.subtitle: No more trusting strangers with your money
escrow.body: Traditional P2P exchanges rely entirely on trust between two people. HOXA changes that with a technology-enforced escrow system — your funds are locked in a secure hold and only released when both parties confirm the transaction is complete.
escrow.tagline: Safer than WhatsApp. Smarter than the street.

appShowcase.title: The Smarter Way to Exchange
appShowcase.subtitle: HOXA on mobile — designed for speed, clarity, and security

reputation.title: A Marketplace Built on Reputation
reputation.subtitle: Know who you're trading with before you send a single cedi
reputation.body: Every seller on HOXA builds a public reputation through verified exchanges. Scores are calculated from transaction history, completion rate, and buyer reviews — giving you full visibility before you commit.

items.name: Ama Owusu
items.text: I used to send money through WhatsApp groups and always worried about getting scammed. HOXA's escrow system means I never have to worry again. It's like having a bank watching over every deal.

items.name: Ibrahim Diallo
items.text: As a seller, HOXA gives me tools I never had before — reputation score, transaction history, dispute support. My clients trust me more and I earn more.

items.name: Efua Mensah
items.text: The rate alerts feature alone is worth it. I waited for my target rate, got notified, and completed the exchange in minutes. No more refreshing chats all day.

items.name: Moussa Traoré
items.text: Clean app, fast transactions, zero stress. HOXA is exactly what the West African market needed. I've already told everyone in my network.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about HOXA

items.a: HOXA is a peer-to-peer currency exchange platform for the CFA ⇄ GHS corridor, secured by an escrow system that protects both buyers and sellers.

items.q: How does the escrow system work?
items.a: When a buyer initiates an exchange, funds are locked in HOXA's escrow. The seller is notified and the transaction begins. Only after the buyer uploads proof of payment and the seller confirms receipt does escrow release the funds.

items.q: Who can become a seller on HOXA?
items.a: Any individual or business operating in the CFA/GHS corridor can apply. Sellers must complete KYC verification and agree to HOXA's trading guidelines.

items.q: What happens if there's a dispute?
items.a: HOXA has a dedicated dispute resolution team. If either party raises a concern, our mediators review transaction logs and communication history to reach a fair resolution.

items.q: Is HOXA available on iOS and Android?
items.a: HOXA is currently in development. Join the waitlist to be among the first notified at launch.
Sellers set their own rates based on market conditions. HOXA displays live market benchmarks so buyers can compare and choose the best available rate.
